headline: Semis Versus Software: Should You Follow The Investment Giants And Their 13-F Actions?
summary: Semiconductor stocks look overbought, while software names like Adobe & Microsoft trade at attractive valuations. Read the full analysis here.

headline: Assessing Analog Devices (ADI) Valuation After Strong AI Data Center And Industrial Growth Update
summary: Analog Devices (ADI) has drawn fresh attention after reporting second quarter sales of US$3,623.47 million and net income of US$1,176.35 million, alongside guidance pointing to US$3.9 billion in forecast third quarter revenue. See our latest analysis for Analog Devices. The stock has had a strong run, with the share price up 17.43% over the past 90 days and delivering a 96.36% total shareholder return over the last year as investors react to earnings, guidance, and AI focused data center...
